prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built L28E (2.8L inline-6) with forged internals (JE 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a T04Z Garrett turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, 60mm turbine wheel) running 18 psi of boost on a custom tubular manifold by Tomei Powered. Fuel system upgraded with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, 1000cc ID injectors, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise tuning.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with an OS Giken 4.375:1 limited-slip differential, Nismo 5-speed close-ratio transmission (H-pattern), and a twin-plate ceramic clutch by Spec Stage 4+. Driveshaft upgraded to a carbon fiber unit by Driveshaft Shop to handle increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height), polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (front and rear), and a custom 3-point strut brace by Cusco. Braking system upgraded to Endless CC-R6 6-pot front calipers with 330mm rotors and 4-pot rear calipers with 310mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to accommodate 17x9.5 +15 front and 17x10.5 +20 rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels wrapped in 225/45R17 and 255/40R17 Toyo R888R tires.

Custom hand-brushed aluminum side skirts and rear quarter panel vents by JUN Auto, paired with a carbon fiber hood (functional NACA ducts) and trunk lid by Seibon. Rear wing replaced with a custom 3D-printed aluminum GT wing by Voltex (Type 3 design, adjustable angle).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back), Takata 4-point harnesses, and a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel. Full custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, mild steel) with integrated fire suppression system by SPA Technique. Gauges replaced with Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, water temp, and fuel pressure) mounted in a custom aluminum dash panel.
